commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Song of Songs 3:10 He made its posts of silver, its base of gold, the covering of its seat of purple, its interior being paved with love, by the daughters of Jerusalem. pillars: We find the Apostles Peter, James, and John called pillars. Gal 2:9 seat: The seat signifies the evangelical preaching on which the Divine Word rests. (Theodoret of Cyrus) lovingly wrought: The Lord suffered for everyone, even for those weak in faith.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Going. Protestants, "covering of it of purple. "(Haydock)
Death must be endured, if necessary, for the sake of the faith, as this is the highest degree of charity. (Worthington)
He Hebrew, "is prepared for the beloved above the "See Homer, Odyssey v. 660. (Calmet)
Protestants and Pagnin, "the midst thereof being paved (Montanus, set on fire) with love for (Montanus, by) the daughters. "(Haydock)
The most desirable things adorn the litter, or the Church, that all may come to her, who has God to guide her decisions. (Menochius)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
